tactics.stateBefore:
D : Set ℂ
f : ℂ → ℂ
hDopen : IsOpen D
hDconn : IsConnected D
h_analytic : AnalyticOn ℂ f D
h_nonzero : ∀ z ∈ D, f z ≠ 0
h_const : ∀ ⦃z w : ℂ⦄, z ∈ D → w ∈ D → f z = f w
⊢ ¬∃ z0 ∈ D, ∀ z ∈ D, ‖f z0‖ ≤ ‖f z‖
⊢ ∃ f, TendstoUniformlyOn (fun n z => ∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc 1 n, (1 / z) ^ j) f atTop {z | 5 ≤ ‖z‖}

p : Polynomial ℂ
n : ℕ
hdeg : p.degree = ↑n
hlead : p.leadingCoeff ≠ 0
⊢ ∃ R > 0,
    (∮ (z : ℂ) in C(0, R), Polynomial.eval z (Polynomial.derivative p) / Polynomial.eval z p) = 2 * ↑n * ↑π * Complex.I

p : Polynomial ℂ
n : ℕ
hp : p.natDegree = n
⊢ Multiset.card p.roots = n

n : ℤ
hn : n ≠ -1
Γ : ℝ → ℂ
hΓ_closed : Γ 0 = Γ 1
hΓ_away : ∀ (t : ℝ), Γ t ≠ 0
⊢ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0 ..1, Γ t ^ n * deriv Γ t = 0

f : ℂ → ℂ
⊢ (∃ a b, ∀ (z : ℂ), f z ∈ (segment ℝ a b).compl) → ∃ c, ∀ (z : ℂ), f z = c

P : Polynomial ℂ
hP : P.natDegree ≠ 0
⊢ Function.Surjective fun z => Polynomial.eval z P

U : Set ℂ
p : ℂ
f : ℂ → ℂ
hU : IsOpen U
hp : p ∈ U
hhol : DifferentiableOn ℂ f (U \ {p})
⊢ ∀ (r : ℝ), 0 < r → Metric.ball p r ⊆ U → ∀ (a b : ℂ), f '' (Metric.ball p r \ {p}) ∩ segment ℝ a b ≠ ∅

γ : ℝ → ℂ
hγ_closed : γ 0 = γ 1
Inside Outside : (ℝ → ℂ) → ℂ → Prop
z : ℂ
⊢ (Inside γ z → g γ z = 6 * ↑π * Complex.I * z) ∧ (Outside γ z → g γ z = 0)

residueAt : (ℂ → ℂ) → ℂ → ℂ
⊢ residueAt (fun z => Complex.sinh z / (z ^ 4 * (1 - z ^ 2))) 0 = 7 / 6

⊢ ∀ (z : ℂ),
    Complex.exp z / (z ^ 2 + ↑π ^ 2) =
      Complex.I / (2 * ↑π) / (z - Complex.I * ↑π) + -Complex.I / (2 * ↑π) / (z + Complex.I * ↑π)
